description: Google Cloud Assured Workloads helps organizations configure and monitor Google Cloud workloads to meet specific compliance and sovereignty requirements. It provides workload management, update, and violation-related resources through the Google Cloud control plane.
summary: Google Cloud Assured Workloads exposes a REST API at `https://assuredworkloads.googleapis.com/` with v1 and v1beta1 reference docs; it requires Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens/ADC.
